when was the last amendment made to the us constitution The last amendment added to the United States Constitution was ratified on May 5, 1993, making this date accurate for identifying the most recent constitutional change. This amendment, known as the Twenty-Seventh Amendment, addresses how Congress members' salaries can be affected by legislative changes and was proposed in 1789 but not ratified until over two centuries later.

when was the last amendment made to the us constitution The last amendment added to the United States Constitution was ratified on May 5, 1993, becoming the 27th Amendment.
